validation.passwordComplexity: Password must be at least 6 characters and contain an uppercase letter, a number, and a special character

signIn.title: Sign In
signIn.description: Enter the email and password you've registered with on Eterna.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email, and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

createNewPassword.title: Create a new password
createNewPassword.description: Come up with a strong password to protect your account.

hero.title: Discover Your Archetypes and Inner Energy
hero.subtitle: Unlock insights about your personality, strengths, and life patterns.

reviews.title: Here are a few stories from Eterna users:

emily.name: Emily
emily.text: I was surprised by how accurate the archetype insights were. It really helped me understand my strengths and the patterns behind my decisions.

sophie.name: Sophie
sophie.text: The analysis felt very personal and easy to understand. Learning about my archetypes made me reflect on my relationships and goals.

daniel.name: Daniel
daniel.text: This experience helped me see my personality in a new way. The archetype insights were clear, thoughtful, and surprisingly accurate.

olivia.name: Olivia
olivia.text: I loved discovering the deeper patterns behind my personality. It gave me a fresh perspective on my life choices.

step1.title: Create account
step1.description: Answer a few questions about yourself to help us design your profile.

step2.title: Take the archetype quiz
step2.description: Take a short quiz to discover the archetypes and personality patterns that shape you.

step3.title: Get your personalized insights
step3.description: We analyze your answers to reveal your key archetypes and deeper personality insights.

step4.title: Explore your personal guide
step4.description: Access your profile anytime to explore your archetypes and personal growth insights.
